scope: Deterministic cassette replay fails closed on changed, missing, out-of-order, or unconsumed calls.
changes: ResponseCassette now supports strict ordered replay with consumed/miss tracking.
replay_snapshot exposes strict_order mode and returns escalation_required on mismatch.
Added regression tests for changed call URL, out-of-order call, missing call, and unconsumed recorded call.

checks.command: PYTHONPATH=src python3 -m pytest tests/test_auth.py tests/test_certificates.py tests/test_ingestion.py tests/test_live_status.py tests/test_release_gate_vertical.py tests/test_replay.py tests/test_verification.py tests/test_viz.py

acceptance_criteria: Replay reproduces the recorded decision when calls match the cassette.
Strict replay fails closed when the agent changes the external call.
Strict replay fails closed when calls happen out of recorded order.
Strict replay fails closed when the agent does not consume every recorded cassette call.
Replay does not make real network calls.
